strategy: Straightforward fight: the guide notes Sapoti has no cheats, so just run the standard setup-and-hit loop.
Sapoti is a Life boss, so it resists Life and takes boosted damage from Death; hit with Death or your strongest off-school attack.
Take out the Rank 3 Storm minion (~525 HP) quickly with a wand hit or small spell so it can't chip you during setup.
Stack a couple of blades, then finish with one AoE to clear the minion and the 3,040-HP boss together.
Sapoti is stunnable and beguilable if you want extra control, but the fight is short enough to simply rush it.
